Recommendation Notes: Use stable segment IDs in specs. Labels remain reference text for humans.
Use AU numeric IDs from the master 61-AU list. This is the preferred lookup for inclusion and exclusion rules.
Recommended when specs need to declare the governing assessment cycle explicitly.
Keep time windows centralized here so metric specs do not invent their own temporal logic.
Recommended canonical field for routing a metric to the correct work package.
Pair this field with included or excluded AU lists depending on the selected strategy.
Use this to standardize what customer or account population a metric is measured over.
Store domains as a list because one metric can support more than one risk lens.
Use the methodology taxonomy ID, not a free-text category label.
This field distinguishes core BDEs from supplemental and control-oriented metrics.
Use the source category to describe ownership of the upstream data, not the exact table name.
Only use these system values when the source category is `rahona`.
